languages.text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, положил жизнь на поиск и коллекционирование имплантов. Ходили слухи, что к отсеку пришлось пристроить отдельную комнату, в которой хранилось собрание бионических рук, купленных, найденных или срезанных с еще живой плоти.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.
languages.original_text: Генетор Ферренц, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, положил жизнь на поиск и коллекционирование имплантов. Ходили слухи, что к отсеку пришлось пристроить отдельную комнату, в которой хранилось собрание бионических рук, купленных, найденных или срезанных с еще живой плоти.

traits.locale_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

languages.text: ジェネター・フェレンツは、セクター・ビオニカの外科医を任され、生涯をインプラントの探求と収集に捧げた。噂では、まだ生きている肉から切り取られたバイオニック・アームの収集のために、その湾に別室が設けられたという。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

traits.locale_text: ジェネター・フェレンツは、セクター・ビオニカの外科医を任され、生涯をインプラントの探求と収集に捧げた。噂では、まだ生きている肉から切り取られたバイオニック・アームの収集のために、その湾に別室が設けられたという。

languages.text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，他毕生痴迷于收集各式植入物。有传言说，仿生区不得不增建一个专属舱室，用来存放他购买、寻获，或从活体上切取的各种仿生手臂。
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

traits.locale_text: 基因士费伦茨被委任管理仿生区医务，他毕生痴迷于收集各式植入物。有传言说，仿生区不得不增建一个专属舱室，用来存放他购买、寻获，或从活体上切取的各种仿生手臂。

languages.text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, passa toute sa vie à chercher et amasser des implants. On racontait qu'il avait été nécessaire d'ajouter à la baie une salle distincte où accueillir sa collection de bras bioniques achetés, trouvés ou arrachés à des individus encore vivants.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

traits.locale_text: Le genetor Ferrenz, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, passa toute sa vie à chercher et amasser des implants. On racontait qu'il avait été nécessaire d'ajouter à la baie une salle distincte où accueillir sa collection de bras bioniques achetés, trouvés ou arrachés à des individus encore vivants.

languages.text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a coleccionar implantes. Según se rumoreaba, fue necesario construir una cámara adicional en la bahía para dar cobijo a la gran cantidad de brazos biónicos que compró, encontró o cortó de la carne viva.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

traits.locale_text: El genetor Ferrenz, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, dedicó su vida a coleccionar implantes. Según se rumoreaba, fue necesario construir una cámara adicional en la bahía para dar cobijo a la gran cantidad de brazos biónicos que compró, encontró o cortó de la carne viva.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika'nın cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını implantları bulmaya ve toplamaya adadı. Söylentilere göre satın alınan, bulunan veya hâlâ canlı etten kesilen biyonik kolların koleksiyonunu yapmak için revire ayrı bir oda eklenmesi gerekmişti.
languages.original_text: Genetor Ferrenz, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, dedicated his life to finding and collecting implants. Rumour had it that a separate chamber had to be added to the bay to house a collection of bionic arms bought, found, or cut from still-living flesh.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika'nın cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Genetör Ferrenz, hayatını implantları bulmaya ve toplamaya adadı. Söylentilere göre satın alınan, bulunan veya hâlâ canlı etten kesilen biyonik kolların koleksiyonunu yapmak için revire ayrı bir oda eklenmesi gerekmişti.

languages.text: Genetor Ferrenz, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, widmete sein Leben der Suche nach Implantaten. Gerüchten zufolge musste die Bucht um eine separate Kammer für eine Sammlung bionischer Arme erweitert werden, die er gekauft, gefunden oder aus noch lebendem Fleisch geschnitten hatte.

Gerüchten zufolge musste die Bucht um eine separate Kammer für eine Sammlung bionischer Arme erweitert werden, die er gekauft, gefunden oder aus noch lebendem Fleisch geschnitten hatte.
